creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you take this Winter Day Trip from NYC!?

*details and location are pinned in the comments*

#nyc #NewYork #daytrip #travel #snow

transcription.text: This is probably the best winter day trip I've taken from New York City, but what shocked me is not this giant snow tubing hill, or the 46 different snowboarding trails, the skylift that takes you up the mountainside, or even the beautiful lodge with the campfire, delicious food and beverages. What actually shocked me is how all of this exists only about an hour outside of Manhattan.
